_comment: Private metadata for mlx-movie-director model registry. Edit freely — this is ours, not HuggingFace.
name: zimage-turbo-fun-union-2.1
description: Z-Image Turbo Fun ControlNet Union 2.1 Lite (2602-8steps) — 5 control layers + 2 refiner blocks. Union-style ControlNet supporting pose/depth/canny/hed/scribble/gray preprocessors via 4-dim type indicator. Lite version optimized for resource-constrained devices; distilled to 8 inference steps.
deprecation_note: Superseded by MLX 4-bit GS32 quantized version — 69% smaller with near-identical output (SSIM 97.9%). Use zimage-turbo-fun-union-2.1-mlx instead.
